fields.publickey: uiyejbdskjfiowe32 (static — Tilda's frontend upload key, captured 2026-05-17)
fields.uploadkey: {{uuid-v4}} — per-upload session token, may be arbitrary UUID-like string

auth_note: Endpoint does NOT require login cookies — it's the public uploader used by all Tilda sites. Treat publickey as opaque shared secret distributed in tilda.cc frontend code.
response_format: {"errorExists":0, "result":[{cdnUrl, uuid, width, height, size, name, ext, ...}]}
